feature.title: Lane Comms Command Deck
feature.purpose: Give each lane a local operator console for owner agent, thread, brief packet, gate boundary, and command draft visibility.

researchInfluences.name: Command-center hierarchy
researchInfluences.takeaway: Use strong hierarchy and low visual noise.

researchInfluences.name: Agent UX override loop
researchInfluences.takeaway: Show what the agent is doing, why, and how an operator can override or recover.

researchInfluences.name: Milestone communication
researchInfluences.takeaway: Keep major transition points visible without burying status in task detail.

implementation.sideEffects: Copies or exposes a local draft only; does not send messages, start workers, mutate service requests, browse, publish, trade, pay, or perform account actions.
